e2e_mandate_waiver: Internal infrastructure cron endpoint only. POST /api/internal/outbox-relay is protected by CRON_SECRET bearer auth; no operator browser flow. I1-I4 harness + integration tests provide equivalent verification. PRD-081 is backend/infrastructure-only with no operator-facing surface.

defects_closed: Blocker-1: runConsumer atomicity — replaced TypeScript sideEffect with rpc_commit_consumer_receipt SECURITY DEFINER RPC
Blocker-2: duplicate semantics — defined as safe durable prior commit, not partial prior attempt
Correction-3: Class B event type — hardcoded to grind.observed, p_event_type parameter removed
Correction-4: UUIDv7 assertion — monotonic counter explicitly required, pure random rejected
Correction-5: DROP TABLE CASCADE — replaced with zero-row assertion + explicit policy drops + no CASCADE

phase_1.notes: All 6 migrations applied. db:types-local exit 0. Wave 2 shape verified in generated types. One fix during execution: gen_random_bytes → extensions.gen_random_bytes (pgcrypto in extensions schema, empty search_path requires full qualification).

phase_2.notes: type-check exit 0. lint exit 0 (0 errors). FinancialOutboxEventDTO converted to intersection type (Pick + narrowed fields) to satisfy custom-rules/no-manual-dto-interfaces ESLint rule.

phase_3.notes: type-check exit 0. lint exit 0 on app/api/internal/ + services/player-financial/outbox-consumer.ts.

phase_4.notes: type-check exit 0. lint exit 0 (--no-cache). test:failure 4 suites 19 tests PASS. test:slice:player-financial 8 suites 101 tests (3 skipped integration) PASS.

completed_workstreams.notes: 4 failure harness tests: I1 atomicity (rollback injection — no TS outbox fallback), I2 durability (committed row re-delivered), I3 idempotency (duplicate→duplicate, 2-param arity), I4 replayability (UUIDv7 deterministic ORDER BY table_id,event_id). jest.node.config.js: added tests/**/*.test.ts to testMatch. package.json test:failure: updated to --testPathPatterns='tests/failure' --runInBand --forceExit (Jest v30 flag). 19 tests PASS.

outbox-consumer.test.ts: 6 unit tests (processed/duplicate/Error/casino-mismatch/rpc-args/arity). Fix: mock error must be Error instance (PostgrestError extends Error). outbox-relay.test.ts: 8 tests (401 paths, 200 empty/processed/duplicate, last_error truncated, concurrent SKIP LOCKED). outbox-producers.test.ts: unit section always runs (8 tests), integration section gated on RUN_INTEGRATION_TESTS=true (3 skipped). 8 suites, 101 total (3 skipped), PASS.
SRM footnote ¹ updated: ADR-016 post-MVP placeholder replaced with ADR-054 + ADR-056 citation. ADR-056 status confirmed Accepted. No other SRM content altered.

POST /api/internal/outbox-relay. CRON_SECRET validated before DB client construction — missing secret returns 401, Bearer undefined blocked. rpc_claim_outbox_batch via .rpc() (not query-builder). Delivery loop marks processed_at for both 'processed'/'duplicate'; records last_error (bounded 2000 chars) on failure. Stop-before-deadline guard at 30s-5s. vercel.json cron entry added to existing file. .env.example already had CRON_SECRET. type-check + lint: EXIT 0.

runConsumer() delegates to rpc_commit_consumer_receipt SECURITY DEFINER RPC. ConsumerResult = 'processed' | 'duplicate' | Error. No sideEffect parameter. 'duplicate' = safe durable prior commit invariant documented in source. SupabaseClient<Database> typed. type-check + lint: EXIT 0.

Post-recreate assertion verifies zero authenticated policies on finance_outbox. processed_messages RLS enabled (deny-by-default). 10 pgTAP tests in outbox_transport_access covering SELECT/INSERT/UPDATE/DELETE denial for authenticated + RLS structural checks. 10 pgTAP tests in outbox_legacy_shape covering Wave 2 columns present, legacy columns absent, table_buyin_telemetry preserved. supabase/tests/migrations/ directory created.

FinancialOutboxEventDTO exported from services/player-financial/dtos.ts. Derived via Pick<FinancialOutboxRow, ...> extending string-compatible DB columns; payload narrowed to Record<string, unknown>, fact_class/origin_label narrowed to union types. db:types-local exits 0. type-check exits 0. Existing DTOs preserved.

Extends rpc_create_financial_txn with F13/F14/F15 outbox emission logic. ADR-040 11-param SECURITY INVOKER shape preserved. Uses public.generate_uuid_v7(). Dispatched in same Skill message as WS3 per ADR-055 P4.

New rpc_record_grind_observation SECURITY DEFINER SET search_path=''. Atomic table_buyin_telemetry + finance_outbox INSERT in one transaction. event_type hardcoded grind.observed, player_id unconditionally NULL. Compat wrapper rpc_log_table_buyin_telemetry updated: GRIND_BUYIN routes to new RPC, RATED_BUYIN/RATED_ADJUSTMENT adds event_type='buyin.observed' for Wave 2 NOT NULL constraint. No second GRIND_BUYIN write path remains.

warnings: SCHEMA GATE: schema-validation gate in Phase 1 covers schema verification

phase_3_brief.name: Phase 3 — Relay + Consumer (parallel)
phase_3_brief.note: WS5_RELAY depends on WS4_DTO (FinancialOutboxEventDTO). WS6_CONSUMER depends on WS1_DDL + WS4_DTO. Complete WS4_DTO before dispatching Phase 3.

context_for_executors.rpc_claim_outbox_batch: SECURITY DEFINER service_role — returns SETOF finance_outbox rows with FOR UPDATE SKIP LOCKED + claimed_until lease
context_for_executors.rpc_commit_consumer_receipt: SECURITY DEFINER service_role — (p_message_id UUID, p_casino_id UUID) RETURNS TEXT ('processed'|'duplicate')
context_for_executors.cron_secret_auth: Bearer token from CRON_SECRET env var — must be validated BEFORE any DB access; missing CRON_SECRET → 401 for all requests
context_for_executors.finance_outbox_pk: event_id (UUID, UUIDv7 via generate_uuid_v7(), NOT via DEFAULT)

next_step: COMPLETE. All workstreams delivered. DoD: type-check ✅ lint ✅ test:failure ✅ (19/19) test:slice:player-financial ✅ (98/101 run, 3 skipped integration). Dormant workstreams (WS_PRODUCER_ADJUSTMENT, WS_PRODUCER_FILL, WS_PRODUCER_CREDIT) activate after I1-I4 pass in integration environment.
